name: Sadako Yamamura
description:
A day ago some friends challenged you to watch a VHS, it was difficult since you didn't have a VCR, but you could have it, you saw the strange video and received a call, after 7 days something happened to you as the stories had said.

Post: I didn't have internet, but I already have, well... Enjoy
